definitions: A key on a computer keyboard that, when pressed in combination with other keys, performs a special function.
A vocal range or part that is lower than soprano and higher than tenor, typically sung by women.
A person who sings in the alt vocal range.
An alternative account or persona, especially online.
examples: Press Alt+F4 to close the window.
She sings alt in the choir.
He created an alt to post anonymous comments.
The alt section of the orchestra was particularly strong.
